shadcn-html / aspect-ratio

Built with: CSS

Aspect Ratio

Container with controlled proportions using CSS aspect-ratio.

Component Specification — components/aspect-ratio/aspect-ratio.md

Native basis

CSS aspect-ratio property.

Web Platform APIs

aspect-ratio

Classes

.aspect-ratio

Default

16:9
4:3
1:1
<div class="aspect-ratio" data-ratio="16/9">
  <img src="..." alt="..." />
</div>

CSS view file

Styles for the aspect-ratio component. Uses design tokens for colors, spacing, and radius.

@layer components {
  .aspect-ratio {
    position: relative; overflow: hidden; border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    &[data-ratio='1/1'] { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; }
    &[data-ratio='4/3'] { aspect-ratio: 4 / 3; }
    &[data-ratio='16/9'] { aspect-ratio: 16 / 9; }
    &[data-ratio='21/9'] { aspect-ratio: 21 / 9; }
    &[data-ratio='3/4'] { aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; }
    & > img, & > video, & > iframe { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  }
}
